title: Generate character reference sheets

title: Generate reusable location sheets
checklist: Haus Nebenwirkung room set is readable and repeatable
Room is broken but not too visually noisy
No wall notes, labels or readable graffiti
Window neon and dirty Berlin palette are locked
Doorway angle works for Falk and Sami entrances

title: Lock pilot episode scenes
checklist: Scene 1 establishes Rico alone
Scene 2 introduces Falk as soft scammer
Scene 3 carries the fee gag without image text
Scene 4 lands Sami punchline
Every scene has setup, escalation and punchline

title: Create TV shot breakdown
checklist: Each shot has duration and timecode
Each shot has camera and animation notes
Each shot has voice and sound cues
Each shot has keyframe prompt and negative prompt
Total target runtime is around 60 seconds

title: Turn scene actions into production tasks
output: job cards for image, voice, review and assembly
checklist: Scene actions are visible in Episode Builder
Actions can become persistent jobs later
Each action has stage, description and output
Scene 3 includes Rebuild Shot 006 Clean
Scene 4 includes Rebuild Sami Punchline

title: Generate pilot TV keyframes
checklist: Shot 001 keyframe approved as establishing v1
Shot 002 keyframe approved as Tupperware moment v1
Shot 003 uses Falk v2 look, not beanie version
Shot 006 must be rebuilt clean with paper angled away
Every keyframe has no speech bubbles or readable text

title: Plan TV motion per shot
input: approved TV keyframes + tvShots animation notes
checklist: Shot 001 slow push-in and neon flicker
Shot 002 Tupperware lid and tiny face beat
Shot 003 door open, keychain swing, Rico freeze
Shot 007 Kralle tail flick and coin clink
No AI-video movement may change character identity

title: Prepare voice and subtitle script
output: voice script and subtitle timing source
checklist: Falk voice stays soft, moral and manipulative
Rico voice stays young and polite
Kralle voice is Kiez-boss dry, not cute
Sami voice is deadpan and short
Subtitle timing leaves room for visual acting

title: Prepare sound design cues
output: sound cue list for pilot assembly
checklist: Room tone, radiator tick and neon buzz are present
Door creak and keychain jingle support Falk entrance
Coin clink supports fee joke
Kralle punchline has tiny sting
Sami punchline stays dry, not over-scored

title: Approve final TV shots
checklist: Character consistency is acceptable
Location continuity is clear
Style matches Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon
No image text artifacts
Every shot is readable without explanation

title: Assemble TV-style comic episode
input: approved TV shots + voice + sound + subtitles
checklist: All 11 TV shots approved
Voice tracks exported
Subtitle timing created
Motion pass applied per shot
Runtime lands around 60 seconds
